compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RAM RVK series, Systemair RVK-A, Rhino Pro inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Controls 2 standard AC fans (FAN AIR IN + FAN AIR OUT Schuko sockets). 5-step heavy-duty mechanical transformer provides silent, buzz-free fan speed control. Available 4A, 8A, and 16A variants. Includes light sensor; removing cap activates PRO function which runs fans 1 step faster for 7 min per hour during dark periods — this is fan-based humidity management, not a separate humidifier output. No outputs for lights, heaters, CO2, or other devices. EC fans incompatible.
